structural_mapping.prototype: other-stages.jsx:17-41 — Card 'Nutrition declaration (per 100g)' with 5-col <table> (Nutrient/Per100g/PerPortion/Target/Status), 7 mock rows
structural_mapping.production: Card + @monopilot/ui Table (TableHeader/Body/Row/Head/Cell). 7 rows server-derived from public.nutrition_profiles JOIN Reference.Nutrients (display_order). data-testid=nutrition-table / nutrition-row.
structural_mapping.status: MATCH (Target column dropped — see deviation D1)

structural_mapping.production: Two @monopilot/ui Buttons. Export CSV enabled (client blob download: header + 7 rows). Generate label PDF disabled with title hint (Phase C4 deferred per risk_red_lines).

structural_mapping.prototype: other-stages.jsx:34-36 — status badge '✓ OK' (green) / '⚠ At limit' (amber)
structural_mapping.production: @monopilot/ui Badge variant success/warning + TEXT label (statusOk/statusWarn). Color is never the sole signal (a11y).
Card data-testid=allergen-card + Table from public.nutrition_allergens (presence enum → Badge). Columns: Allergen/Source ingredient/Presence.
structural_mapping.status: MATCH (cols adapted to real schema — see deviation D2)

structural_mapping.prototype: other-stages.jsx:57-76 — Card 'Nutri-Score preview', A-E colored scale + active grade letter + driver note + 'Run what-if'
structural_mapping.production: Card data-testid=nutri-score-card. A-E scale (gradeTone green→red), active letter marked data-active + scale/ring + sr-only 'Nutri-Score grade {grade}'. Grade from public.nutri_score_results (latest).
structural_mapping.status: MATCH (driver note + 'Run what-if' dropped — see deviation D3)

required_states.permission_denied: permission_denied.html — role=alert forbidden copy (RBAC resolved server-side, table never rendered)

real_data_wiring.access: withOrgContext -> app.set_org_context -> RLS app.current_org_id() as app_user. No mocks, no hardcoded rows.
real_data_wiring.validated_against: clone @141 monopilot_d2_t_074 — all 5 read queries EXPLAIN-plan successfully; Reference.Nutrients returns the canonical 7 rows.

deviations.what: Prototype 'Target' column + per-row OK/At-limit derived from a target.
deviations.why: No per-nutrient target column exists in the T-069 schema (086-nutrition.sql). Status is NOT fabricated — all computed rows render 'ok'. The Status column + traffic-light component are retained and exercised (warn path covered by RTL fixture) so the pattern is ready when a targets table lands.
deviations.follow_up: Add per-nutrient targets (Reference) + derive status server-side in a later task.

deviations.what: Allergen table columns differ: prototype shows %/Cross-contact; production shows Presence enum.
deviations.why: public.nutrition_allergens stores presence (contains/may_contain/free_from/unknown) + no %/cross-contact columns. source_ingredient is selected as null (not stored on this table). free_from rows are filtered out of the declaration.
deviations.follow_up: Wire % + cross-contact when the allergen-cascade source (fa_allergen_overrides / line history) is joined in.

deviations.what: Nutri-Score driver note ('Driven by salt content…') and 'Run what-if' button omitted.
deviations.why: Driver text needs the score sub-components (not persisted in nutri_score_results, which stores grade + computed_score only); 'Run what-if' is the costing what-if interaction (out of scope here, read-only screen).
deviations.follow_up: Surface driver breakdown when score sub-components are persisted; wire what-if alongside costing screen.

a11y.color_not_sole_signal: status badges carry text (OK/At limit); Nutri-Score active grade has sr-only 'Nutri-Score grade {grade}' announcement
a11y.axe_blocker: Full axe-core/playwright scan deferred to module Gate-5 live-deploy (needs running server + auth + seed). RTL DOM snapshots provided as fallback per AC4.

playwright_blocker: Playwright happy-path/trace capture requires Next server + Supabase auth + seeded nutrition rows (module-level Gate-5). At the component-task layer that stack is unavailable; RTL per-state DOM snapshots + parity_report are the AC4 fallback evidence.
